notes.en: [[character:lyney]] does high damage using his [[ability:ca]]s along with supplemental damage from his [[ability:skill]] and [[ability:burst]]. Because of his A4, he is commonly used in **Mono-[[element:pyro]] teams.**
notes.fr: [[character:lyney]] inflige beaucoup de dégâts grâce à ses [[ability:ca]]s ainsi que des dégâts supplémentaires avec son [[ability:skill]] et [[ability:burst]]. Son passif A4 fait qu'il est généralement joué dans des **équipes Mono-[[element:pyro]].**
notes.it: [[character:lyney]] provoca molti danni utilizzando i suoi [[ability:ca|Attacchi Caricati]], accompagnati da danni supplementari provocati da [[ability:skill]] e [[ability:burst]]. A causa del suo talento A4, è spesso utilizzato in team Mono-[[element:pyro]].
notes.ru: [[character:lyney]] наносит наибольшую часть урона своими [[ability:ca|Заряженными атаками]], остальную же - [[ability:skill|Элементальным навыком]] и [[ability:burst|Взрывом стихии]]. Из-за второго Пассивного таланта он обычно играет в **моно-[[element:pyro]] отрядах**.
